features.title: The High-Tech Organic Advantage
features.card1_desc: Enriched with specific lab-tested microbial isolates that unlock fixed mineral phosphorus naturally inside your soil.
features.card2_desc: Advanced organic pelletizing ensures stable distribution curves over extended months without risk of crop nutrient burning.

process.subtitle: Natural Bio-Engineers
process.title: Premium Vermicompost Production
process.desc1: At Hariom High-Tech, we don't use artificial chemicals. We partner with thousands of live earthworms to biologically break down raw organic mass into pure, nutrient-dense humus. This technical process multiplies soil microbial activity and makes macro-nutrients instantly bio-available for plant roots.
